creator: fabien.thomas@wanadoo.fr
text:
3.4-STABLE, 4.0-RELEASE
BRIDGE option enabled

on different hardware platform 
 + K6-2 300 chipset SiS 
 + Celeron 366 chipset intel 810
 
3COM 905B is slow when using multiple adapter (2, 3) on the same system
(FTP transfer < 100Kb/s) when only one adapter is used 
all is working perfectly.

How-To-Repeat: 2 or 3 3COM 905B and FTP client/server
